'''dhazhada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaalah|vaalah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaalah|vaalah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhazhada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzhædæth|dhæzhædæth]] || [[word:dhæzhædæj|dhæzhædæj]] || [[word:dhæzhædæsh|dhæzhædæsh]] || [[word:dhæzhædæ|dhæzhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhazhadath|dhazhazhadath]] || [[word:dhazhazhadaj|dhazhazhadaj]] || [[word:dhazhazhadash|dhazhazhadash]] || [[word:dhazhazhada|dhazhazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhadath|dhazhadath]] || [[word:dhazhadaj|dhazhadaj]] || [[word:dhazhadash|dhazhadash]] || [[word:dhazhada|dhazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhafdath|dhazhafdath]] || [[word:dhazhafdaj|dhazhafdaj]] || [[word:dhazhafdash|dhazhafdash]] || [[word:dhazhafdaf|dhazhafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazhadatha|dhazhadatha]] || [[word:dhazhadaja|dhazhadaja]] || [[word:dhazhadasha|dhazhadasha]] || [[word:dhazhadaka|dhazhadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazhadath|dhazhadath]] || [[word:dhazhadaj|dhazhadaj]] || [[word:dhazhadash|dhazhadash]] || [[word:dhazhada|dhazhada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazhadathal|dhazhadathal]] || [[word:dhazhadajal|dhazhadajal]] || [[word:dhazhadashal|dhazhadashal]] || [[word:dhazhadakal|dhazhadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazhadathatha|dhazhadathatha]] || [[word:dhazhadajaja|dhazhadajaja]] || [[word:dhazhadashasha|dhazhadashasha]] || [[word:dhazhadaka|dhazhadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazhadathan|dhazhadathan]] || [[word:dhazhadajan|dhazhadajan]] || [[word:dhazhadashan|dhazhadashan]] || [[word:dhazhadakan|dhazhadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazhadathaoro|dhazhadathaoro]] || [[word:dhazhadajaoro|dhazhadajaoro]] || [[word:dhazhadashaoro|dhazhadashaoro]] || [[word:dhazhadakaoro|dhazhadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
